factsheet.opc_fullname: Example Hybrid Arable Observation and Processing Chain
factsheet.validation_status_notes: Validated mainly for arable mineral soils under temperate-boreal conditions.

models.notes: Used to estimate biomass-related carbon inputs.
Receives carbon-input estimates from upstream module.

initial_conditions.propagation_method: State initialization uncertainty sampled from prior distributions informed by baseline SOC data.

drivers.propagation_method: Weather and management inputs sampled from reported or assumed uncertainty distributions.

parameters.propagation_method: Posterior parameter samples from Bayesian calibration.

process_error.propagation_method: Residual dynamic uncertainty added as time-evolving stochastic term.

random_effects.propagation_method: Documented qualitatively; not yet explicitly propagated.

validation_evidence_overview.summary_result: Performance acceptable for annual to multi-annual SOC change estimation in arable mineral soils under current test conditions.
validation_evidence_overview.remaining_gap: Limited validation in peat soils, permanent grassland, and highly heterogeneous management systems.

validation_evidence_overview.dataset_type: farmer records cross-checked with independent farm sample
validation_evidence_overview.summary_result: Yield estimates are adequate for use as one driver of carbon input estimation, with performance varying by crop type.
validation_evidence_overview.remaining_gap: Sparse independent evidence for mixed rotations and cover-crop systems.

transparency_traceability.short_justification: Versions are documented, but some code and parameter sets are not fully open.
transparency_traceability.evidence_notes: Repository links exist, but release notes and full parameter provenance are incomplete.

scientific_credibility.short_justification: The OPC is based on peer-reviewed modelling components and published calibration work.
scientific_credibility.evidence_notes: Peer-reviewed references available for both the productivity and soil modules.

suitability.short_justification: Calibration and validation evidence exists for some but not all intended pedoclimatic and management conditions.
suitability.evidence_notes: Evidence strongest in arable mineral soils; weaker in peat soils and highly heterogeneous systems.

minimum_accuracy.short_justification: Several performance metrics are available, but alignment with the required minimum-accuracy framing is not yet fully demonstrated.
minimum_accuracy.evidence_notes: Prediction-interval coverage and PMU-aligned comparisons need clearer reporting.
